## Verification Contract

Follow [docs/contracts/verification-model.md](/home/orchestrator/odin-os/docs/contracts/verification-model.md).

- [ ] unit coverage added or updated where applicable
- [ ] contract coverage added or updated where applicable
- [ ] integration coverage added or updated where applicable
- [ ] this PR changes user-visible or orchestration-facing behavior
- [ ] if the box above is checked, real `odin` command proof is included below

## Proven

- list only behaviors directly demonstrated by tests or real `odin` commands

## Unproven

- list behaviors not exercised
- list external dependencies that remained stubbed or deferred
- list residual risks that still rely on reasoning instead of evidence

## Commands Run

```bash
# tests

# real odin commands, when applicable
```

## Notes

- call out any contract or docs changes
- note if this work should extend an existing E2E instead of adding a parallel one
